examples.name: Two DHCP leases, one with default gateway
examples.input:
Temp IP addr: 40.182.4.1  for peer on Interface: HundredGigE1/1/0
Temp  sub net mask: 255.255.255.252
   DHCP Lease server: 40.182.4.2, state: 5 Bound
   DHCP transaction id: 1663D15A
   Lease: 3600 secs,  Renewal: 1800 secs,  Rebind: 3150 secs
   Next timer fires after: 00:19:01
   Retry count: 0   Client-ID: 00fd.22bc.b860
   Client-ID hex dump: 00FD22BCB860
   Hostname: SM-Hub2
Temp IP addr: 40.187.4.1  for peer on Interface: TenGigabitEthernet1/0/6
Temp  sub net mask: 255.255.255.252
   DHCP Lease server: 40.187.4.2, state: 5 Bound
   DHCP transaction id: 6AAAF114
   Lease: 86400 secs,  Renewal: 43200 secs,  Rebind: 75600 secs
Temp default-gateway addr: 40.187.4.2
   Next timer fires after: 10:15:49
   Retry count: 0   Client-ID: cisco-00fd.22bc.b846-Te1/0/6
   Client-ID hex dump: 636973636F2D303066642E323262632E
                       623834362D5465312F302F36
   Hostname: SM-Hub2

examples.name: Infinite lease with no timer and a second lease with finite time
examples.input:
Temp IP addr: 110.1.1.11  for peer on Interface: GigabitEthernet1/0/47
Temp  sub net mask: 255.255.255.0
   DHCP Lease server: 110.1.1.1, state: 5 Bound
   DHCP transaction id: D7AA0C96
   Lease: Infinite
   No timer running
   Retry count: 0   Client-ID: cisco-5c5a.c777.b7d5-Gi1/0/47

                       623764352D4769312F302F3437
   Hostname: cmt-cat9k-3

   DHCP Lease server: 111.1.1.1, state: 5 Bound

Temp default-gateway addr: 112.1.1.1
   Next timer fires after: 12:01:35
